name: Shopify
recommendedFor: Merchants launching or scaling an online store
notRecommendedFor: Teams that only need a content blog
reviewNotes: Verify current plan names and regional pricing before publishing.

name: Klaviyo
recommendedFor: DTC brands with repeat purchase potential
notRecommendedFor: Tiny lists that only need basic newsletters
reviewNotes: Model pricing with real contact count, email volume, and SMS volume.
